2604.17114.title: The Provenance Gap in Clinical AI: Evidence-Traceable Temporal Knowledge Graphs for Rare Disease Reasoning
2604.17114.paper_summary: Frontier large language models generate clinically accurate outputs, but their citations are often fabricated. We term this the Provenance Gap. We tested five frontier LLMs across 36 clinician-validated scenarios for three rare neuromuscular disease pairs. No model produced a clinically relevant PubMed identifier without prompting. When explicitly asked to cite, the best model achieved 15.3% relevant PMIDs; the majority resolved to real publications in unrelated fields. We present HEG-TKG (Hierarchical Evidence-Grounded Temporal Knowledge Graphs), a system that grounds clinical claims in temporal knowledge graphs built from 4,512 PubMed records and curated sources with quality-tier stratification and 1,280 disease-trajectory milestones. In a controlled three-arm comparison using the same synthesis model, HEG-TKG matches baseline clinical feature coverage while achieving 100% evidence verifiability with 203 inline citations. Guideline-RAG, given overlapping source documents as raw text, produces zero verifiable citations. LLM judges cannot distinguish fabricated from verified citations without PubMed audit data. Independent clinician evaluation confirms the verifiability advantage (Cohen's d = 1.81, p < 0.001) with no degradation on safety or completeness. A counterfactual experiment shows 80% resistance to injected clinical errors with 100% detectability via citation trace. The system deploys on-premise via open-source models so patient data never leaves institutional infrastructure.
2604.17114.paper_summary_zh: 前沿的大型語言模型生成臨床上準確的輸出，但它們的引用經常是虛構的。我們將此稱為來源差距。我們在三對罕見的神經肌肉疾病中測試了五個前沿的LLM，涵蓋36個臨床醫生驗證的場景。沒有任何模型在未提示的情況下產生臨床相關的PubMed識別碼。當明確要求引用時，最佳模型達到了15.3%的相關PMID；大多數則解析為與主題無關的真實出版物。我們提出了HEG-TKG（分層證據基礎的時間知識圖），這是一個將臨床主張基於從4,512個PubMed記錄和經過策劃的來源中構建的時間知識圖的系統，並具有質量層級劃分和1,280個疾病軌跡里程碑。在使用相同合成模型的受控三臂比較中，HEG-TKG在臨床特徵覆蓋方面與基線相匹配，同時實現了100%的證據可驗證性，並有203個內聯引用。當給定重疊的來源文檔作為原始文本時，Guideline-RAG產生零個可驗證的引用。LLM評審無法在沒有PubMed審計數據的情況下區分虛構和已驗證的引用。獨立的臨床醫生評估確認了可驗證性的優勢（Cohen's d = 1.81，p < 0.001），且在安全性或完整性上沒有下降。一項反事實實驗顯示，對注入的臨床錯誤有80%的抵抗力，並且通過引用追踪實現100%的可檢測性。該系統通過開源模型在本地部署，因此患者數據永遠不會離開機構基礎設施。
2604.17114.author: Md Shamim Ahmed et.al.
2604.17114.authors: Md Shamim Ahmed, Maja Dusanic, Moritz Nikolai Kirschner, Elisabeth Nyoungui, Jana Zschüntzsch, Lukas Galke Poech, Richard Röttger
